data.body: RETRACTION (2026-04-26): The scope-expansion comment posted earlier today is misplaced. This epic is closed and all 7 children are closed; new SCs cannot land here. The C1 + C2 mitigations originally directed to this epic have been redirected to c183-ed2a (the open sibling that extends PRECONDITIONS decisions_log handling). See c183-ed2a comments and docs/new-epics-4-26.md for the corrected allocation. This comment is informational only — no action required on this closed ticket.
